MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Granted as unopposed.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: John True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/JT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted As To Claimant Yen Cao
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted As To Claimant Yen Cao is GRANTED. The People are ORDERED to present an Order via email to pvanzandt@aghwlaw.com setting forth the relief requested in the Motion.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.
